LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_TargetLang: 【Target Language】\nSet which language the AI should translate foreign mods into．
LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_Provider: 【AI Provider】\nSelect the AI model provider you want to use．Using Google (Gemini) or OpenAI is highly recommended．
LanguageData.ATC_PlzFetchModel: Please click Fetch Model List first
LanguageData.ATC_Msg_EmptyKey: How can you test when the Key is not filled in！
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestSuccess: [Test] Test successful！AI core response is good．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestFail: [Test] Test failed！Please check network or API settings．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_Init: [Init] Loading mods and building global translation sharing pool．．．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_InitDone: [Init] Complete！Collected a total of {0} Def translations．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_StartScan: Auto Translation Core started！Target mods count：{0}
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SkipMod: [Skip] No Languages or Defs found．Pure code mod．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_DefScan: [DefInjected] Starting deep scan and global comparison．．．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_Clean: [Clean] Production line stopped and memory released．
LanguageData.ATC_CancelRequested: Stop command received，emergency braking production line．．．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FetchModelsFail: [System] Failed to fetch list，please check your API key．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_AllTranslationWritten: [Success] All translations have been safely written to !Translation_AI_Pack！
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NetworkRetry: [System] Network fluctuation or server busy detected，auto-retry mechanism triggered．．．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MigrateSuccess: [System Migration] Seamlessly migrated {1} of {0} to the new architecture！
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SingleModDone: Individual translation task successfully wrapped up！
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ProcessAbortedWithSave: [System] Production line safely aborted，translated content has been retained．
LanguageData.ATC_FinishMessage_Text:
Translation task completed successfully！
【🪂 Memory Airdrop Success】
The system has directly injected the latest translations into the game memory through official and legal channels！
You can close this window and settings panel now．The items and technologies on the screen have instantly switched to your configured language！
(Note：An actual XML backup has been automatically generated in the background，but you 【absolutely do not need】 to check and enable it in the mod list！The system will automatically mount it stealthily upon next startup，completely bidding farewell to loading order conflicts！Have a great game！)
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_FullText:
【Tutorial】
1． Choose 【Target Language】 (supports mutual translation between multiple languages such as Chinese，Japanese，Korean，English，Russian，Ukrainian，etc．) and 【Provider】．We recommend free Google (Gemini) for Taiwan players，and DeepSeek for Mainland China players！
2． Apply for 【API Key】 and paste it．Supports "Infinite API Magazine"！You can click the "+" button to add multiple interfaces，and the system will automatically rotate tasks for you to perfectly squeeze out free limits！
3． 【Automatic Model Detection】 After pasting the key (length must be greater than 10)，you don't need to click any search button at all；the system will automatically fetch models in the background！After successful fetching，simply select the model from the dropdown menu on the right．
4． Adjust 【Max Threads】 (recommended setting：number of valid interfaces x 3)．Then click the green 【🚀 Start Full Scan】 to perform a global scan，or use 【🎯 Translate Multi-Mod】 to execute precise localization！If you want to interrupt，you can click 【🛑 Emergency Stop】 at any time．
5． 【🎉 After Translation Completed】
No need to restart the game at all！The system will automatically launch a "Memory Airdrop"，instantly injecting translations into the game．Close the panel to see the effect！
(The system will generate an actual XML backup in the background，but you 【do not need】 to check and enable it in the mod list．It will be automatically stealthily mounted next time you start up！)

【FAQ Q＆A】
Q： What is "One-click Injection Hot Reload"？
A： If you are a hardcore player who likes to manually edit generated translation XML files using a text editor．After saving the file，simply click this button，and the system will instantly refresh the frontend UI cache and re-airdrop memory．See results instantly without restarting！

Q： Why does the production line log keep showing red warnings of "communication timeout" or "waiting to retry"？
A： This is because the API server is sleeping or hitting a rate limit！The mod has a powerful built-in automatic backoff retry and key-rotation polling mechanism．As long as translation success logs continue to appear later，just let it run for a while～(≧∀≦)ゞ

Q： Why does the local server (LM Studio / Ollama) or proxy API always fail to connect？
A： 1． Please make sure your "Custom Base URL" is entered correctly (for example http://localhost:1234)．Don't worry about forgetting the suffix，the system will automatically append /v1 for you！
2． API Key must never be left blank！If it is a local environment, please type any characters randomly．

Q： Will the dynamic UI interceptor be very laggy？
A： V2.0 introduces "light speed cache" and "anti-burst valve" mechanisms．Even when facing an error tsunami, the game still locks stably at 120FPS．However，please note that this function captures all untranslated foreign texts on the screen．If you are using a paid API, please use it with discretion to avoid skyrocketing bills！
LanguageData.ATC_UpdateLog_FullText:
--- V2.2 Core Architecture and Connection Stability Update ---
• Optimization【API Request Architecture】：Refactored underlying logic，improving compatibility with different AI providers and data parsing stability。
• Implementation【Auto Backoff Retry】：When encountering server congestion（HTTP 429）or momentary connection anomalies（HTTP 500+），the system will automatically cooldown and retry，reducing the chance of translation interruption。
• Addition【Custom Timeout and Testing】：Added a「Test Connection」button and a「Timeout Seconds Slider」to the settings interface。（If using a deep thinking model，the system will automatically adapt to a longer wait time）。
• Improvement【Global Error Notification】：Introduced cross-thread UI bridging technology，now when an API connection anomaly or invalid key occurs，a prompt will immediately pop up in the top left corner of the game screen。

--- V2.1 Translation Experience and Smart Upgrade ---
• Implementation【One-Click Package Export】：Supports independently extracting translated mods to the desktop，attaching a declaration watermark，making it convenient to submit to the original author or localization group for polishing。
• Addition【Smart Mod Update Radar】：The system can now automatically detect mods that「Have Updates」or are「Untranslated」。
• Support【Auto Old-for-New Replacement】：When enabled，upon encountering a mod update，the system will automatically delete the old translation file and re-translate，ensuring the text stays up to date。
• Fix【String Newline Anomaly】：Fixed an underlying issue where some 
 failed to wrap correctly，causing layout errors。

--- V2.0 Performance Optimization and Real-Time Rendering ---
• Implementation【Real-Time Memory Injection】：After translation is complete，the system writes the translation results directly into the game memory，and the screen instantly switches to the target language。It takes effect automatically on the next boot，reducing load order conflicts。
• Optimization【Dynamic UI Intercept Performance】：Refactored the underlying intercept logic and cache design，significantly reducing the performance consumption of game framerate（FPS）。
• Addition【One-Click Hot Reload】：After manually modifying the XML translation file，you can click the button to instantly refresh the UI cache without restarting the game。

--- V1.0 Official Release ---
• Implementation【Dynamic UI Intercept System】：Supports real-time interception and automatic translation of foreign texts missing from the settings panel or static XML。
• Implementation【Original Text Comparison Function】：Supports mouse hover to display the original text，facilitating bilingual comparison。
LanguageData.ATC_ApiConfigTitle: API Interface Magazine Settings (Supports Multi-Thread Rotational Polling)
LanguageData.ATC_NoModelWaitKey: No model selected (Paste Key to auto-fetch)
LanguageData.ATC_EmptyConfigWarning: Please set at least one valid set of API parameters！
LanguageData.ATC_MaxThreadsTip: Highly recommended：the number should be valid interfaces x 3
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiRecovered: [API] Reconnected successfully！Production line returns to high-speed operation．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiRetry: [API] Translation busy or timeout．Waiting {0} seconds to retry．．．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiFallback: [API] Block translation completely failed．Activating "downgrade 1v1 mode" to parse sentence by sentence．．．
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_ApiCritical: [API Critical Error] Translation of text inside 【{0}】 completely failed！Original text retained．
LanguageData.ATC_MultiSelect_Search: Enter mod name here to search．．．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MultiScanDone: All multi-select mod translation tasks completed！
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_OldToxicFiles: 【Warning】 Detected legacy abnormal translation files．To prevent errors，forced cleanup will be executed！
LanguageData.ATC_Log_AutoRebuildStart: 【System】 The system will automatically rebuild a clean translation package for you！
LanguageData.ATC_Log_UIInterceptorStarted: Dynamic UI Interceptor is online！Starting background cache system．．．
LanguageData.ATC_EnableUIInterceptor: Enable Dynamic UI Hardcoded Intercept 【Warning：May affect performance】
LanguageData.ATC_Log_AdvancedDetoxSuccess: Advanced detox complete！Precisely excised {0} violating tags to protect player's translation assets (repaired {1} files in total)！
LanguageData.ATC_DeleteModTrans_Title: Translation File Incinerator (Check mods to delete translations)
LanguageData.ATC_ConfirmDelete_Btn: Confirm deletion of translation files for {0} mods (Cannot be undone！)
LanguageData.ATC_Log_DeleteTransSuccess: 🗑️ [ATC System] Successfully deleted translation files for {0} mods (cleaned up {1} files in total)！
LanguageData.ATC_Message_DeleteTransSuccess: Successfully deleted {0} translation files！Recommended to restart game to apply changes．
LanguageData.ATC_Message_DeleteTransError: ⚠️ Error occurred while deleting translation files：{0}
LanguageData.ATC_Msg_NoModelListManualInput: Currently failed to fetch model list．Please input model name manually！
LanguageData.ATC_ShowOriginalUI: Show Original UI (Hover mouse to display English before machine translation)
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MemoryDropSuccess: [Memory Airdrop] Successfully injected {0} system texts and {1} item definitions！
LanguageData.ATC_Button_HotReload: One-click Injection Hot Reload (No restart required，refresh screen！)
LanguageData.ATC_Message_HotReloadSuccess: 🪂 [Memory Airdrop] Translations injected instantly，UI window cache fully refreshed！
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_InvalidXmlKey: [XML Defense] AI returned Key containing invalid characters and was automatically skipped：{0}
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_AuthFailed: [API Auth Failed] Provider [{0}] returned 401．Please check if API Key is correct．
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_RateLimit: [API Rate Limit] Provider [{0}] returned 429．Wait time automatically extended．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SkipExistingTranslation: [Skip] Mod [{0}] already has {1} translations．Skipping duplicate translation．
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_DeepL_LangNotSupport: [DeepL] Target language [{0}] is not supported by DeepL．Please use another AI provider．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MemoryDropQueued: [Memory Airdrop] Added to main thread queue，waiting for next Tick injection．．．
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MemoryDropSkipMainThread: [Memory Airdrop] Detected call from background thread．Automatically transferred to main thread for processing．
LanguageData.ATC_ExportEula_CountdownDone: Please check the three statements below
LanguageData.ATC_ExportEula_Check1: I have read the above terms carefully and fully understood them
LanguageData.ATC_ExportEula_Check2: I promise to use it only for personal gameplay or as reference material for manual polishing
LanguageData.ATC_ExportEula_Check3: I understand that the legal consequences of distribution are related to myself
LanguageData.ATC_ExportEula_NeedAllChecks: Must check all three items to continue
LanguageData.ATC_ExportEula_FullText:
📜 Copyright Respect
The copyright of the original text of the mod belongs to the original mod author．AI translated products belong to "Derivative Work"．According to the copyright laws of various countries，distributing derivative works requires explicit authorization from the original author．

🚫 Strictly Prohibited
• Uploading to Steam Workshop is strictly prohibited
• Uploading to NEXUS / Mod.io / any public platform is strictly prohibited
• Public sharing via cloud links (Google Drive，Baidu Wangpan，etc．) is strictly prohibited
• Distribution through torrents，Discord，and other channels is strictly prohibited
• Falsely claiming it as official translation or translation group's work is strictly prohibited
• Any form of commercial use is strictly prohibited

✅ Allowed Usage
• Personal local game use
• Reference material for manual polishing by translation groups (authorization from the original author is still required after polishing to publish)
• Direct submission to the original mod author as translation contribution
• Private sharing among friends (not public)

📋 Tool Neutrality Declaration
This tool only provides local translation assistant functions．This tool：
• Does not actively upload any translation content
• Does not collect user translation data
• Does not assist in distributing derivative works
• Does not endorse any upload behavior

⚖️ Disclaimer
The developer of this tool is not responsible for users' distribution behavior．Any copyright disputes，community conflicts，or legal lawsuits caused by users exporting and distributing files using this function shall be borne by the users themselves and have nothing to do with the author of this tool．

🚨 Legal Consequences
Violating this statement may lead to：
• DMCA takedown notice
• Steam account ban
• Civil lawsuit (compensation for original author's losses)
• Criminal liability (according to copyright law regulations of various countries)

⏰ Agreement Validity Period
This agreement is valid for 30 days．After 30 days，you will be asked to read and agree again to ensure you continue to be aware of terms changes．

📝 Record Preservation
Local saves "consent record" (including consent time，version，device information) as proof that the user was aware of the terms．Do not delete this file．
LanguageData.ATC_ExportReminder_AlreadyAccepted: You agreed to EULA v{1} on {0}
LanguageData.ATC_ExportReminder_DaysLeft: This agreement is valid for another {0} days
LanguageData.ATC_ExportReminder_Rule1: ❌ Must not upload to Steam Workshop
LanguageData.ATC_ExportReminder_Rule3: ✅ Limited to personal use or manual polishing purposes only
LanguageData.ATC_ExportWindow_NoFullSelectNotice: ⚠️ Please check individually (anti-abuse mechanism：this tool deliberately does not provide select all)
LanguageData.ATC_ExportWindow_WatermarkNotice: ⚠️ Each XML file will automatically add a "machine translation warning" watermark
LanguageData.ATC_ExportWindow_NoModSelected: Please select at least one mod
LanguageData.ATC_ExportWindow_NoTranslationFound: Currently there are no translated mods．Please run translation tasks first．
LanguageData.ATC_Export_Success_Message: Successfully exported {0} mods ({1} files in total)\n\nLocation：{2}
LanguageData.ATC_Log_EulaAccepted: [EULA] Player agreed to v{0}，record written to local．
LanguageData.ATC_Export_CooldownReady_Free: ⏱️ Current Cooldown Status：Can export immediately (no cooldown this time)
LanguageData.ATC_Export_CooldownReady_NextWillCooldow: ⏱️ Current Cooldown Status：Can export immediately (next export needs {0} seconds cooldown)
LanguageData.ATC_Export_TooManyToday: ⚠️ Exported {0} times today，reaching daily limit．Please try again tomorrow．
LanguageData.ATC_Export_TooManyAtOnce: Maximum 10 mods can be exported at once，please export in batches．Currently selected：{0}．
LanguageData.ATC_Export_CooldownDialogMsg: Still need to wait {0} seconds before next export．\n\nThe smart cooldown mechanism is designed to prevent abuse．Legitimate use cases (such as translation retries or mod comparisons) usually do not trigger it．
LanguageData.ATC_ContactAuthor_Title: 💌 Want to contribute translation to original author？
LanguageData.ATC_ContactAuthor_JustExported: You just exported translations for {0} mods．
LanguageData.ATC_ContactAuthor_Intro: Contributing translation directly to the original author is much more meaningful than uploading to Workshop：
LanguageData.ATC_ContactAuthor_Benefit1: ✅ The original author can integrate the translation into the official version
LanguageData.ATC_ContactAuthor_Benefit2: ✅ Your contribution will be listed in the mod update log
LanguageData.ATC_ContactAuthor_OpenWorkshop: 🌐 Open Steam Workshop to contact author
LanguageData.ATC_ContactAuthor_CannotOpenWorkshop: Unable to open Steam Workshop (Steam may not be installed or mod lacks Workshop link)
LanguageData.ATC_ContactAuthor_NoSteamMods: No mods can contact via Steam Workshop (might all be local Mods folder mods)
LanguageData.ATC_EmailTemplate_Body:
Hi {0},

I'm a fan of your mod "{1}". I've drafted a {2} translation using AI tools as a starting point, and I'd love to contribute it back to your mod.

The translation includes:
- {3} DefInjected entries
- {4} Keyed entries

I understand it's machine-generated and may need human polishing before being officially included. I'm sharing the files so you can:
- Use them as a starting point for an official translation
- Pass them to a community translator
- Or simply have them as reference

The files were exported to my desktop using a tool called "Auto Translation Core". I have NOT and will NOT redistribute them publicly.

Would you like me to send them to you? I can attach them in a reply, or send them via Discord / GitHub PR if you prefer.

Thank you for making such an amazing mod!

Best regards,
A Player
LanguageData.ATC_Export_Success_ContactAuthorBtn: 💌 I want to contribute translation to original author
LanguageData.ATC_AutoClearOldOnUpdate: Smart Incremental Translation：Keep existing translations when mods update and only call AI for new texts (extremely cost-saving)
LanguageData.ATC_ModUpdateStatusBtn: Smart Incremental Translation (Found {0} updated or untranslated mods)
LanguageData.ATC_ClearCacheSuccess: Automatically removed old translation files for {0} updated mods.
LanguageData.ATC_Export_Readme_Full: WARNING: AUTO-GENERATED MACHINE TRANSLATION WARNING：This folder contains products generated by AI Machine Translation．Please read carefully． Generation Time: {0} Generator: Auto Translation Core Mod Count: {1} Exported Mods: {2} Strictly Prohibited 1． Direct upload to Steam Workshop is strictly prohibited． 2． Direct upload to NEXUS / Mod.io / other public platforms is strictly prohibited． 3． Public sharing via cloud links (Google Drive，Baidu Wangpan，etc．) is strictly prohibited． 4． Falsely claiming it as official translation or translation group's work is strictly prohibited． 5． Commercial use is strictly prohibited． ================================================================ Allowed Usage 1． Personal local game use． 2． Reference material for manual polishing by translation groups (authorization from the original author is still required after polishing to publish)． 3． Submission to the original mod author as translation contribution reference． 4． Private sharing with friends (not public)． ================================================================ Legal Notice This translation is a product of AI machine translation and belongs to "Derivative Work" of the original work． According to the copyright laws of various countries，distributing derivative works requires explicit authorization from the original author． Unauthorized distribution may lead to： * DMCA takedown notice * Steam account ban * Legal lawsuit (up to criminal liability) ================================================================
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SkipRequested: ［System］The player has actively requested to skip the current mod…
LanguageData.ATC_AutoClearOldOnUpdate: Ensure Accuracy：Before translating updated mods，forcefully delete old translations（Recommended to enable）
LanguageData.ATC_AutoTranslateOnUpdate: Fully Auto Scheduling：If a mod update is found upon game startup，automatically launch the translation pipeline in the background（Default off）
LanguageData.ATC_Error_Timeout: API Request Timeout（Timeout）。Possible model overload or unstable network。
LanguageData.ATC_Error_Connection: Unable to connect to {0} server，please check the network or if the node is blocked by a firewall。
LanguageData.ATC_Error_Unauthorized: API Key invalid or quota exhausted（HTTP 401/403）。
LanguageData.ATC_Warning_InvalidUrlFallback: Invalid custom URL：{0}，will attempt to hard load…
LanguageData.ATC_Error_ParseFailed: AI return format error（Invalid JSON）。Please check the prompt，or switch to a smarter model。
LanguageData.ATC_Error_RateLimit: API request frequency too high（HTTP 429）。Please increase the interruption delay，or try again later。
LanguageData.ATC_Error_ServerError: AI server crashed or under maintenance（HTTP 500+）。Please switch to another model or provider。
LanguageData.ATC_Error_HttpGeneric: API request failed（HTTP {0}），please check the error log。
LanguageData.ATC_Log_RetryAttempt: Encountered HTTP {0}，preparing for the {1}th retry（Cooldown {2} ms）…
LanguageData.ATC_Log_RetryTimeout: Request timeout，preparing for the {0}th retry（Cooldown {1} ms）…
LanguageData.ATC_Setting_Timeout_Tooltip: When the AI does not respond within this time，the system will automatically interrupt and cooldown before retrying。Recommended setting is 60~120\n（If using a deep thinking model，the background will strictly force a minimum wait of 300 seconds）
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestSuccess: Connection test successful！API response is normal，and the parsing format is correct。
LanguageData.ATC_Msg_TestFailed: ［{0}］Test failed，please check the top left corner or the red text in the log for the reason。
LanguageData.ATC_FilteredCodeOnly: Filtered {0} pure code mods，no translation needed。
